mapper.select: select log_id, company_id, user_id, action, action_description, entity_type, entity_id, detail, created_at from activity_logs order by created_at desc
select log_id, company_id, user_id, action, action_description, entity_type, entity_id, detail, created_at from activity_logs order by created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into activity_logs (log_id, company_id, user_id, action, action_description, entity_type, entity_id, detail, created_at) values (#{logId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actionDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
